title: metathelypteris dassanayakei
intro: Metathelypteris dassanayakei is a species of fern, specifically a type of thelypterid fern, which is a group of ferns that belong to the family Thelypteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Metathelypteris dassanayakei lie in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of various compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Metathelypteris dassanayakei typically involve the plant's leaves being dried and made into a tea or infusion, or being used in traditional medicine to create topical creams and ointments.
